name: Innate Immune Pattern Recognition
description: Pattern recognition: PRRs detect microbial PAMPs, and surface vs endosomal receptors recruit MyD88 or TRIF adaptors, activating NF-kB and IRF transcription factors to induce cytokines and type I interferons.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Microbial PAMP"]
    N2["PRR engagement (TLR/RLR)"]
    N3{"Receptor location?"}
    N4["Surface TLR4: MyD88"]
    N5["Endosomal TLR3/7/9: TRIF"]
    N6["IRAK/TRAF6 -> IKK"]
    N7["NF-kB to nucleus"]
    N8["IRF3/7 activated"]
    N9["Cytokines + type I IFN"]
    N10["Antimicrobial inflammation"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 -->|surface| N4
    N3 -->|endosomal| N5
    N4 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N5 --> N8
    N7 --> N9
    N8 --> N9
    N9 --> N10

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style N3 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: Receptor location?
nodeDetails.detail: Cell-surface vs endosomal receptor determines adaptor

nodeDetails.label: Surface TLR4: MyD88
nodeDetails.detail: Surface TLRs recruit the MyD88 adaptor

nodeDetails.label: IRAK/TRAF6 -> IKK
nodeDetails.detail: Adaptor complex activates the IKK kinase

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.

sources.title: The role of pattern-recognition receptors in innate immunity: update on Toll-like receptors
Innate immune pattern recognition: a cell biological perspective
sources.authors: Brubaker, S. W.; Bonham, K. S.; Zanoni, I.; Kagan, J. C.
